title: Bridging the Gap in Vision Language Models in Identifying Unsafe Concepts Across Modalities
disclaimer: This paper shows examples of unsafe concepts/images. Reader discretion is advised.

introduction.key_challenge: modality gap - inconsistencies in VLMs' responses depending on whether input is text or image

research_questions: Can VLMs effectively recognize various unsafe concepts? Does the modality gap consistently exist in VLMs when identifying unsafe concepts across different modalities?
If the modality gap consistently exists, how can we bridge the gap with the minimum impact on VLMs' general capabilities?

definitions.visual_unsafe_concept: an image that presents a certain unsafe concept

methodology.models_tested: eight popular models (both open-source and commercial VLMs)
